## Summary
- 

## Quality Gates
- [ ] `dart format --output=none --set-exit-if-changed .`
- [ ] `flutter analyze`
- [ ] `flutter test`

## Testing
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated for behavior changes
- [ ] Regression test added for bug fix (if applicable)

## Manual Checks (if platform-sensitive)
- [ ] iOS verified
- [ ] Android verified
- [ ] Accessibility pass (VoiceOver/TalkBack) if UI changed
- [ ] Sync/export/import/manual flows validated if affected

## Migration / Compatibility Notes
- [ ] No migration required
- [ ] Migration documented below
